title: tengine.stream.dump_ready v1
description: A buffer dump landed on disk; consumers can read in parallel with the silo run loop. Producer: tengine silo_tester via the registry handle STREAM_DUMP_READY in crates/tengine-dgc-hal/src/silo/shadergen_handlers/event_registry.rs. CloudEvents subject is 'frame_{frame}'. schema_hash is null when the buffer schema is not registered with a stable hash.

frame.description: GPU frame index at which the dump was emitted

slot.description: internal slot identifier for the dumped buffer

schema_hash.description: stable hash of the buffer's field layout; null when no schema is registered

path.description: absolute path to the dumped binary file

bytes.description: on-disk size of the dump in bytes
